message.name: HEARTBEAT
message.description: Message encoding the current state of the rocket
message.field: Vehicle or component type. For a flight controller component the vehicle type This should be used in preference to component id for identifying the component type.
MAVLink version, not writable by user, gets added by protocol because of magic data type: uint8_t_mavlink_version

message.name: RADIO_FREQUENCY
message.description: Message containing the new frequency for radio

message.name: RADIO_STATUS
message.description: Status generated by radio and injected into MAVLink stream.
message.field: Local (message sender) received signal strength indication in device-dependent units/scale. Values: [0-254], UINT8_MAX: invalid/unknown.
Remote (message receiver) signal strength indication in device-dependent units/scale. Values: [0-254], UINT8_MAX: invalid/unknown.
Local background noise level. These are device dependent RSSI values (scale as approx 2x dB on SiK radios). Values: [0-254], UINT8_MAX: invalid/unknown.
Remote background noise level. These are device dependent RSSI values (scale as approx 2x dB on SiK radios). Values: [0-254], UINT8_MAX: invalid/unknown.
Count of radio packet receive errors (since boot).
Count of error corrected radio packets (since boot).
